methods.description: Statistical significance was determined using t-test or lm functions either in SAS or with R to evaluate the differences in the dataset.

steps.description: Statistical significance was determined using t-test or lm functions either in SAS (SAS Institute Inc. 4 ) or with R.
steps.searchable_summary: perform t-test or linear model analysis using SAS or R

methods.description: Analysis of the categorical response in pollen germination using logistic regression with the mblogit function of the mclogit package in R.

steps.description: Analysis of the categorical response in pollen germination (i.e., the proportion of germinated, ruptured, and ungerminated pollen grains) via logistic regression used the mblogit function (Baseline-Category Logit Models for Categorical and Multinomial Responses) of the mclogit package in R.
steps.searchable_summary: perform logistic regression analysis using mblogit function in R

steps.description: The categorical dataset was modeled using Genotype + Timepoint + Replicate as factors, with dispersion estimated using the 'Afroz' default.
steps.searchable_summary: model categorical dataset with specified factors and estimate dispersion
